recommendations.title: Valley Girl
recommendations.overview: Julie, a girl from the valley, meets Randy, a punk from the city. They are from different worlds and find love. Somehow they need to stay together in spite of her trendy, shallow friends.

recommendations.title: Real Genius
recommendations.overview: When teenage geniuses Mitch Taylor and Chris Knight, working on an advanced laser project, learn that the military wants to use it as a weapon, they decide to thwart the plan.

recommendations.title: Material Girls
recommendations.overview: Two wealthy sisters, both heiresses to their family's cosmetics fortune, are given a wake-up call when a scandal and ensuing investigation strip them of their wealth.

recommendations.title: If These Walls Could Talk 2
recommendations.overview: The stories of three lesbian couples -- who live in the same house at different periods of time -- who are at a crossroads in their lives. In 1961, Edith loses her lover, Abby, to a stroke. Linda and Amy struggle with feminist issues in 1972. And, in
recommendations.director: Jane Anderson, Martha Coolidge, Anne Heche

recommendations.title: The Prince & Me
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale love-story about pre-med student Paige who falls in love with a Danish Prince "Eddie" who refused to follow the traditions of his parents and has come to the US to quench his thirst for rebellion. Paige and Edward come from two different

recommendations.title: Triangle of Sadness
recommendations.overview: A celebrity model couple are invited on a luxury cruise for the uber-rich, helmed by an unhinged, alcoholic captain. What first appears Instagrammable ends catastrophically, leaving the survivors stranded on a desert island in a struggle of hierarchy

recommendations.title: Swept Away
recommendations.overview: A spoiled rich woman and a brutish Communist deckhand become stranded alone on a desert island after venturing away from their cruise.

recommendations.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes
recommendations.overview: Lorelei Lee is a beautiful showgirl engaged to be married to the wealthy Gus Esmond, much to the disapproval of Gus' rich father, Esmond Sr., who thinks that Lorelei is just after his money. When Lorelei goes on a cruise accompanied only by her best

recommendations.title: Midnight at the Magnolia
recommendations.overview: Longtime friends and local radio hosts Maggie and Jack fake it as a couple for their families and listeners in hopes of getting their show syndicated.

recommendations.title: Bitter Moon
recommendations.overview: A passenger on a cruise ship develops an irresistible infatuation with an eccentric paraplegic's wife.
